title: Alberto Sanjuan
text: Home * People * Alberto Sanjuan Alberto Sanjuan , a Spanish computer engineer and computer chess programmer living in Seville , Andalusia . Supported by chess advisers Jose Antonio Morillas and Juan José Corbalán , Alberto Sanjuan is primary author of the UCI compliant chess engine Rhetoric [1] .
